languages.text: "Архивраг на той металлической планете... Я не могу забыть увиденное. Мы не представляли, какой ужас он представляет собой на самом деле".
"The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."
languages.original_text: "Архивраг на той металлической планете... Я не могу забыть увиденное. Мы не представляли, какой ужас он представляет собой на самом деле".

traits.locale_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."
"The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."
"The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

languages.text: 「あの金属の惑星で見た敵…その恐ろしさは想像を絶する。我々はその恐ろしさのほんの一部しか知らなかった」
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

languages.text: "O metal gezegendeki Şerbaşı... Gördüklerimi düşünmeden edemiyorum. Gerçekte ne kadar korkunç olduğu hakkında hiçbir fikrimiz yokmuş."
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

traits.locale_text: "O metal gezegendeki Şerbaşı... Gördüklerimi düşünmeden edemiyorum. Gerçekte ne kadar korkunç olduğu hakkında hiçbir fikrimiz yokmuş."

languages.text: “那个金属行星上的混沌大敌……我无法停止回想所见的一切，我们从未想过它竟如此恐怖。”
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

traits.locale_text: “那个金属行星上的混沌大敌……我无法停止回想所见的一切，我们从未想过它竟如此恐怖。”

languages.text: "Der Erzfeind auf diesem Metallplaneten ... Ich muss ständig daran denken, was ich gesehen habe. Wir hatten keine Ahnung, wie schrecklich er tatsächlich ist."
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

traits.locale_text: "Der Erzfeind auf diesem Metallplaneten ... Ich muss ständig daran denken, was ich gesehen habe. Wir hatten keine Ahnung, wie schrecklich er tatsächlich ist."

languages.text: « Le Grand Ennemi, sur cette planète de métal… Je ne cesse de repenser à ce que j'ai vu. Nous étions loin d'imaginer une telle horreur. »
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

traits.locale_text: « Le Grand Ennemi, sur cette planète de métal… Je ne cesse de repenser à ce que j'ai vu. Nous étions loin d'imaginer une telle horreur. »

languages.text: «El Archienemigo en ese mundo de metal... No puedo dejar de pensar en lo que vi. No sabíamos lo espantoso que es en realidad».
languages.original_text: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."

traits.locale_text: «El Archienemigo en ese mundo de metal... No puedo dejar de pensar en lo que vi. No sabíamos lo espantoso que es en realidad».
